summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Real LLM Integration for AI Offers (Hybrid Mode). All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing of ExtraWorkModal with city field, provider badge, explanation, city factor display all working correctly. LLM provider (GPT-4.1-mini via emergentintegrations) is being used successfully.
critical_code_review_comments: Hybrid AI provider architecture is well-implemented with LLM primary and rule-based fallback
CITY_PRICE_FACTORS correctly applied: София=1.15, Пловдив=1.00, Варна=1.05, Бургас=1.02
Data capture fields (ai_provider_used, ai_confidence, ai_raw_response_summary) properly stored in drafts
Materials have reason field for each item as requested
Explanation text returned in AI proposals
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed drafts during backend testing (all cleaned up automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hybrid AI Proposal (LLM + Rule-based) fully tested. LLM uses OpenAI GPT-4.1-mini via emergentintegrations library with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_hybrid_ai_proposal.py covers: LLM provider detection, city-aware pricing (София=1.15, Пловдив=1.00, Варна=1.05, Бургас=1.02), data capture fields, materials with reason, explanation text. Frontend ExtraWorkModal accessible from ProjectDetailPage via 'Допълнително СМР' button (data-testid='new-extra-work-btn').

backend_ai_proposal_llm_provider.notes: POST /api/extra-works/ai-proposal returns provider='llm' when LLM succeeds

backend_city_factor_plovdiv.notes: city=Пловдив returns city_factor=1.00 (null in response since no adjustment)

backend_explanation_field.notes: AI proposal returns explanation text field with meaningful content

backend_materials_have_reason.notes: All materials in AI proposal have reason field explaining their purpose

backend_unknown_text_llm_handling.notes: Unknown construction terms (e.g., 'Монтаж на PVC дограма') handled by LLM with reasonable confidence

backend_apply_ai_stores_raw_response_sum.notes: apply-ai stores ai_raw_response_summary field with explanation text

frontend_extra_work_modal_city_field.notes: Extra Work Modal shows 'Град (за ценови ориентир)' input field with 'София' as default

frontend_ai_proposal_provider_badge.notes: AI proposal shows 'AI (LLM)' badge in green when LLM provider used

frontend_ai_proposal_explanation_italics.notes: AI proposal shows explanation text in italics below recognition section

frontend_ai_proposal_city_factor_display.notes: AI proposal shows 'Град: София (коеф. 1.15)' when city factor applicable

frontend_ai_proposal_related_smr.notes: 'Свързани СМР' section shows related construction activities as badges

frontend_ai_proposal_pricing_breakdown.notes: Pricing breakdown shows Материал/ед, Труд/ед, Общо/ед, Прогноза общо

mocked_apis.note: NO MOCKED APIS - Real LLM integration active using OpenAI GPT-4.1-mini via emergentintegrations library
